#include <unordered_map>
#include <vector>

long long solve(std::vector<long long> nums, long long k) {
    long long prefix_sum = 0;
    long long current_max = 0;
    std::unordered_map<long long, long long> min_mod;
    min_mod[0] = 0; // initial state: prefix_sum is 0, current_max is 0.

    for (long long num : nums) {
        prefix_sum += num;
        long long mod = prefix_sum % k;
        long long candidate = 0;
        if (min_mod.find(mod) != min_mod.end()) {
            candidate = prefix_sum + min_mod[mod];
        }
        current_max = std::max(current_max, candidate);
        // Update the min_mod for this mod.
        long long value_to_store = current_max - prefix_sum;
        if (min_mod.find(mod) == min_mod.end()) {
            min_mod[mod] = value_to_store;
        } else {
            min_mod[mod] = std::min(min_mod[mod], value_to_store);
        }
    }

    long long total_sum = prefix_sum;
    return total_sum - current_max;
}

#include <unordered_map>
#include <vector>

long long solve(std::vector<long long> nums, long long k) {
    long long prefix_sum = 0;
    long long current_max = 0;
    std::unordered_map<long long, long long> min_mod;
    min_mod[0] = 0; // initial state: prefix_sum is 0, current_max is 0.

    for (long long num : nums) {
        prefix_sum += num;
        long long mod = prefix_sum % k;
        long long candidate = 0;
        if (min_mod.find(mod) != min_mod.end()) {
            candidate = prefix_sum + min_mod[mod];
        }
        current_max = std::max(current_max, candidate);
        // Update the min_mod for this mod.
        long long value_to_store = current_max - prefix_sum;
        if (min_mod.find(mod) == min_mod.end()) {
            min_mod[mod] = value_to_store;
        } else {
            min_mod[mod] = std::min(min_mod[mod], value_to_store);
        }
    }

    long long total_sum = prefix_sum;
    return total_sum - current_max;
}

We need to use an unordered_map to track the min_mod. But in C++, we need to include <unordered_map>.

So, the code:

#include <unordered_map>
#include <vector>

long long solve(std::vector<long long> nums, long long k) {
    long long prefix_sum = 0;
    long long current_max = 0;
    std::unordered_map<long long, long long> min_mod;
    min_mod[0] = 0; // initial state: prefix_sum is 0, current_max is 0.

    for (long long num : nums) {
        prefix_sum += num;
        long long mod = prefix_sum % k;
        long long candidate = 0;
        if (min_mod.find(mod) != min_mod.end()) {
            candidate = prefix_sum + min_mod[mod];
        }
        current_max = std::max(current_max, candidate);
        // Update the min_mod for this mod.
        long long value_to_store = current_max - prefix_sum;
        if (min_mod.find(mod) == min_mod.end()) {
            min_mod[mod] = value_to_store;
        } else {
            min_mod[mod] = std::min(min_mod[mod], value_to_store);
        }
    }

    long long total_sum = prefix_sum;
    return total_sum - current_max;
}
